assertions.title: All headings render in Syne font

steps.expected: Dashboard renders headings to validate computed font-family starts with Syne
steps.observed: Route redirected to /login and page stayed in Loading state with runtime errors
Repeated error: Missing NEXT_PUBLIC_INSFORGE_URL or NEXT_PUBLIC_INSFORGE_ANON_KEY

steps.action: Run computed-style collection for heading selectors
steps.expected: Heading elements present with Syne font-family
steps.observed: headingCount = 0; no heading/font-heading elements available to validate

evidence.network: Not applicable due blocker before dashboard render

assertions.issues: Cannot validate heading fonts because required InsForge env variables are missing and dashboard/login do not render testable UI.

assertions.title: TodaysPrompt caches result across navigations

steps.expected: First /dashboard visit triggers one POST /api/generate and second visit reuses cache with no new call
steps.observed: Each protected route redirected to /login due runtime env error before dashboard content loaded
No requests captured because dashboard never reached executable prompt flow

assertions.issues: Prompt caching behavior could not be validated because /dashboard never loaded due missing NEXT_PUBLIC_INSFORGE_URL/NEXT_PUBLIC_INSFORGE_ANON_KEY runtime dependency.

frictions.description: When the app fails during bootstrap, interactive snapshot only shows the dev overlay control and not the intended UI.
frictions.resolution: Captured annotated screenshots, console logs, computed-style dump, and network logs as blocker evidence.

blockers.description: Runtime configuration missing: NEXT_PUBLIC_INSFORGE_URL and NEXT_PUBLIC_INSFORGE_ANON_KEY are not available to the running app instance, causing auth/dashboard flows to fail before assertions can be exercised.
blockers.quickFixAttempted: Retried navigation/reload across /login, /dashboard, and /calendar; verified repeated identical runtime error and persistent redirect to /login.

summary: Tested 2 assigned assertions: 0 passed, 0 failed, 2 blocked by missing InsForge public env vars in the active app runtime.
